scripts.dev: clear && node scripts/banner.js && concurrently --prefix none "node --watch backend/server.js" "npm --silent --prefix frontend run dev -- --logLevel warn"
scripts.build: npm ci --prefix backend && npm ci --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && mkdir -p backend/public && cp -R frontend/dist/. backend/public/ && echo '=== backend/public contents ===' && ls -la backend/public && echo '=== backend/public/assets contents ===' && ls -la backend/public/assets
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
